title: Privacy-Preserving Learning Path
description: Build fluency in Privacy-Preserving Learning inside Distributed Learning by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Federated Learning
steps.summary: Federated Learning belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Hybrid Federated Learning and Federated Learning (Flower).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Federated Learning Techniques
steps.summary: Federated Learning Techniques belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Federated Learning and Federated Learning Architectures. It opens into Differential Privacy Techniques in Federated Learning and Federated Learning with Secure Aggregation Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Federated Learning with Privacy
steps.summary: Federated Learning with Privacy belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Federated Learning and Federated Learning Architectures. It opens into Federated Learning with Differential Privacy and Differential Privacy Techniques in Federated Learning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Federated Learning Architectures
steps.summary: Federated Learning Architectures belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Q-Learning and V-Learning. It opens into Hybrid Federated Learning and Federated Learning (Flower).
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Federated Learning with Differential Privacy
steps.summary: Federated Learning with Differential Privacy belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Federated Learning with Privacy and Federated Learning. It opens into Differential Privacy Techniques in Federated Learning and Federated Learning with Differential Privacy Techniques.

steps.title: Federated Averaging
steps.summary: Federated Averaging belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Model Averaging. It opens into Federated averaging server and Federated Averaging (FedAvg).
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Federated Learning with Secure Aggregation
steps.summary: Federated Learning with Secure Aggregation belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Federated Learning and Federated Learning Architectures. It opens into Federated Learning with Secure Aggregation Techniques.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.

steps.title: Federated Learning (Flower)
steps.summary: Federated Learning (Flower) belongs to the Distributed Learning area of AI/ML, within Privacy-Preserving Learning. It sits inside Distributed Learning / Privacy-Preserving Learning. Start after Federated Learning and Federated Learning Architectures.
